posts.title: AWS EKS PV 设定
posts.text: 在进行操作前依据以下文档安装EBS CSI driver依照中文版说明安装EBS CSI driver doc 安装csi driver 后 Storage Class - 管理员提供了一种描述他们提供的存储的“类”的方法。 不同的类可能映射到服务质量级别，或备份策略，或者由群集管理员确定的任意策略 storage class 范例 需要注意在type 部份注明EBS type 否则可能创建出 gp3等type 123456789kind: StorageClassapiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1metadata: name: ebs-scparameters: fsType: ext4 type: gp2provisioner: ebs.csi.aws.comvolumeBindingMode: WaitForFirstConsumer PVC - Persistent Volume Claim 是用户实际的存储的请求PVC 范例在PNC 中指定access mode, 存储大小等 1234567891011apiVersion: v1kind: PersistentVolumeClaimmetadata: name: ebs-claimspec: accessModes: - ReadWriteOnce storageClassName: ebs-sc resources: requests: storage: 4Gi PV - Persistent Volume 依据PVC 已经建立成功的实际PV可以看到实际的vol-ID

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
